ddls:
CREATE TABLE "salary_scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary scale */,
  "gs_grade" TEXT /* GS grade (e.g., GS-1, GS-2) */,
  "step_1" REAL /* Salary for Step 1 */,
  "step_2" REAL /* Salary for Step 2 */,
  "step_3" REAL /* Salary for Step 3 */,
  "step_4" REAL /* Salary for Step 4 */,
  "step_5" REAL /* Salary for Step 5 */,
  "step_6" REAL /* Salary for Step 6 */,
  "step_7" REAL /* Salary for Step 7 */,
  "step_8" REAL /* Salary for Step 8 */,
  "step_9" REAL /* Salary for Step 9 */,
  "step_10" REAL /* Salary for Step 10 */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the salary scale became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The date when the salary scale will expire */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the salary scale, including any special notes or conditions */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the salary scale is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the employee works in */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "current_grade" TEXT /* Current GS grade of the employee */,
  "current_step" INTEGER /* Current step of the employee within the grade */,
  "current_salary" REAL /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* The current position or job title of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the employee's direct supervisor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender of the employee */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* The hometown or place of origin of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* The name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "last_promotion_date" TEXT /* The date of the last promotion */,
  "last_salary_increase_date" TEXT /* The date of the last salary increase */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* The scheduled date for the next performance review */,
  "is_probationary" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the employee is in a probationary period */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* The current status of the employee (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the department head */,
  "department_budget" REAL /* The annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* The main location of the department */,
  "department_size" INTEGER /* The number of employees in the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the department is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the office belongs to */,
  "office_head_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the office head */,
  "office_budget" REAL /* The annual budget allocated to the office */,
  "office_size" INTEGER /* The number of employees in the office */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the office is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_office_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  "performance_period_start" TEXT /* The start date of the performance evaluation period */,
  "performance_period_end" TEXT /* The end date of the performance evaluation period */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the evaluation is the final one for the period */,
  "evaluator_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the evaluator belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position or job title of the evaluator */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the department head overseeing the evaluator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the evaluator is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluators_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_records" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being promoted */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "from_grade" TEXT /* GS grade before the promotion */,
  "from_step" INTEGER /* Step before the promotion */,
  "to_grade" TEXT /* GS grade after the promotion */,
  "to_step" INTEGER /* Step after the promotion */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary after the promotion */,
  "promotion_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the promotion */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the person who approved the promotion */,
  "is_reversed" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the promotion was reversed */,
  "reversal_date" TEXT /* The date when the promotion was reversed, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_records_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary change record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose salary changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the salary change */,
  "old_salary" REAL /* Old salary before the change */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change (e.g., promotion, step increase) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the person who approved the salary change */,
  "is_reversed" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the salary change was reversed */,
  "reversal_date" TEXT /* The date when the salary change was reversed, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)
